results.title: Police Say Nothing Stopping FENZ From 'Investing In Their Own Helicopter' After Frontline Tensions
results.description: Police and FENZ are both part of the SAR operational leadership group that approved the aviation coordination overhaul in March. It is being led by RCC and is expected to take two or three years. It is unclear how it will be funded.

results.title: Paraguay beats Turkiye, punches USA’s ticket to Bay Area knockout round
results.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. – The United States’ red-hot national team is headed to the Bay Area for its first knockout stage match. After the beating Australia in Seattle on Friday afternoon, the Americans simply needed Paraguay to draw with Turkiye...

results.title: Paraguay cling on with 10 men to eliminate Turkey from World Cup
results.description: A stunning early strike and a first-half red card set up a dramatic contest as Turkey exit the competition
